```sparql
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?conflict ?conflictLabel WHERE {
  ?conflict wdt:P710 wd:Q810 ; wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q198 ; wdt:P580 ?startTime .
  FILTER(?startTime >= "1946-05-25" ^^ xsd:date)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?conflict rdfs:label ?conflictLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?conflictLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY ?startTime
```
